summary: The user sought inspiration for healthy breakfast ideas and discussed their homemade granola, expressing interest in oatmeal bowls, yogurt parfaits, and breakfast burritos. They also inquired about low-sugar snack options and trail mix recipes, ultimately deciding to try the Classic Mix and Tropical Bliss combinations while implementing storage tips for freshness.
facts: The user made a batch of homemade granola to use as a topping for oatmeal or yogurt. The user is trying to reduce their sugar intake. The user plans to try making breakfast burritos with scrambled eggs and avocado. The user is excited to try the Classic Mix and Tropical Bliss trail mix recipes. The user will add cinnamon-spiced almonds to their trail mix for extra flavor. The user will store their trail mix in airtight containers and keep them in a cool, dry place. The user will divide the trail mix into smaller portions to maintain freshness.
